reviews.title: Maintenance nightmare as app grows
reviews.content: We spend more time maintaining Selenium scripts than writing new tests. Every UI change breaks 30+ tests.
reviews.author: QA Lead

reviews.title: Slow execution kills CI/CD pipeline
reviews.content: Full regression suite takes 6 hours. Cannot run on every PR. Bugs caught late in the cycle.
reviews.author: Senior QA Engineer

reviews.title: Cross-browser testing is a full-time job
reviews.content: Setting up cross-browser grids requires dedicated DevOps. Infrastructure management consumes too many resources.
reviews.author: Automation Engineer

reviews.title: Non-technical team cannot contribute to tests
reviews.content: Only senior automation engineers can write tests. Product managers cannot contribute, creating bottlenecks.
reviews.author: QA Manager

reviews.title: Reporting is too basic
reviews.content: Test reports are just pass/fail logs. No trend analysis, no insights on flaky tests, no visibility for management.
reviews.author: Engineering Manager
